page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6a.16xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture utilizing an AMD EPYC 7H12 processor clocked at 2.6 GHz. The instance provides 64 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, resulting in 64 vCPUs. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on external storage options, and features a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks reveal a clear distinction between single-core and multi-threaded capabilities. The single-core CPU performance under stress-ng is positioned in the bottom 10%, and single-threaded gzip compression is weak. However, the instance demonstrates strong multi-threaded performance, with bzip3 multi-threaded decompression and Passmark CPU scores placing in the top 25%. Memory bandwidth and database operations remain in the average range, with Redis SET operations achieving 52.74 million operations per second and static web serving throughput reaching 14.87 GB/sec.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the high core density and dedicated CPU allocation make this instance suitable for parallelizable workloads that do not require massive per-core memory allocations. The lack of bundled local storage and GPUs reduces baseline infrastructure costs for compute-heavy tasks. Appropriate workloads include multi-threaded data processing, bzip3 decompression tasks, web serving, and parallelized compute workloads that can leverage the 64 dedicated AMD EPYC cores.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6a.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 7H12 processor at 2.6 GHz, paired with 128.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this x86_64 server lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, utilizing a 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data indicates a significant contrast in performance: single-core metrics are relatively weak, while multi-threaded capabilities are strong, as evidenced by top-tier Passmark CPU and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression scores. Memory bandwidth, database operations, and static web serving throughput perform at average levels. This resource profile is highly suited for parallelized compute tasks, multi-threaded data processing, and web serving workloads that benefit from dedicated core allocations without requiring high per-core memory capacity.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6a.16xlarge is a compute-optimized server with 64 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-threaded performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6a.16xlarge features 64 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs and 128 GB RAM, offering strong multi-threaded performance for compute workloads.
tagline: A high-density, compute-optimized virtual server featuring sixty-four dedicated AMD EPYC cores for highly parallelized multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated AMD EPYC 7H12 vCPUs at 2.6 GHz
128.0 GB of system memory with 2.0 GB per core
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Strong multi-threaded CPU and decompression performance
Optimized for parallelized compute and web serving workloads
